reformatting_basis: Derived from signal_projection_fastapi_compatible.json. Condition IDs remapped from BlueEdge COND-XX namespace to FastAPI COND-PSIG-XXX-XX namespace. Source: blueEdge condition_correlation_state.json (COND-01..COND-10). Condition content derived from PSIG signal assignments and zone membership.
id_mapping_rule: BlueEdge COND-XX conditions correlate with CEU role activations. FastAPI COND-PSIG-XXX-YY conditions correspond to signal-specific pressure conditions. Mapping is signal-driven: conditions where PSIG signals activate are assigned COND-PSIG-XXX-01 IDs.

conditions.activation_basis: NODE-0021 outbound IMPORTS count (69) is statistical outlier in 35-node distribution. z-score=5.663 > threshold 2.0.
DOM-04 aggregated IMPORTS count (71) is statistical outlier in 13-DOM distribution. z-score=3.210 > threshold 2.0.
PZ-001 contains 15/35 nodes (42.86% fraction), outlier z-score=2.182 > threshold 2.0.
unanchored_count=0 from ceu_node_map.json. No unanchored nodes — structural telemetry marker only.

namespace_mapping.mapping_basis: FastAPI condition IDs are signal-derived (one condition per active PSIG). BlueEdge native COND-XX are CEU-derived (one per CEU role). The sets are orthogonal — this artifact replaces the CEU-based conditions with signal-based conditions for FastAPI conformance.
